name: Alpaca Trading API
what_it_does: Commission-free brokerage API for algorithmic trading of US stocks and crypto, providing order management, account data, market data, and real-time streaming for trading agents and bots.
use_cases: Building algorithmic trading agents for US equities and crypto
Paper trading simulation for testing strategies without real money
Real-time market data streaming via WebSocket for live signals
Portfolio management and position tracking via API
Building trading apps with broker-dealer infrastructure
not_for: Non-US users without US brokerage account eligibility
best_when: You're building an algorithmic trading agent or bot that needs commission-free US stock/crypto trading with a clean API.
avoid_when: You need options/futures trading, non-US markets, or institutional execution quality.

auth.notes: APCA-API-KEY-ID and APCA-API-SECRET-KEY headers. Separate keys for paper and live trading environments. Simple and agent-friendly.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free paper trading and basic market data; live trading requires funded account
pricing.paid_tiers: Algo Trader Plus from $99/month for unlimited data; live trading is commission-free
pricing.notes: Paper trading is completely free. Live trading requires account funding but no commissions. Premium market data (real-time) requires paid subscription.

performance.rate_limits: 200 requests/minute for trading API; data streaming via WebSocket is separate

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear error responses with code and message fields. Trading errors include regulatory reason codes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Client order IDs (client_order_id) provide idempotency for order submission.
known_agent_gotchas: Paper trading and live trading use different base URLs - critical mistake to mix them up
Market hours matter - orders during extended/pre-market behave differently
Free tier uses 15-minute delayed data - real-time requires paid subscription
PDT rule (Pattern Day Trader) applies to accounts under $25k - agents must track day trades
MCP server is community-maintained, not official Alpaca engineering

security_score_components.security_notes: API key + secret pair. Separate paper trading (sandbox) keys. Regulated broker — FINRA/SIPC. SOC2. CRITICAL: Live trading API can execute real financial transactions — always test with paper trading first. Rate limits protect against runaway agents.
